div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in the United Kingdom (Bingham)
div.p:
78. Your 153, April 1, 6 p.m.Not printed. With references to British hope that this and other governments will, like the British, send to China an economic technician, it would assist Department, in its present consideration of the matter, to receive replies if they can conveniently be had to questions as follows: 1.
Has British Government informed Chinese Government of contemplated appointment of British economic technician and if so what are the views of the Chinese Government in regard thereto? 2.
Has British Government definitely selected its representative and if so whom and when will he proceed to China? 3.
Are the views of the French and the Japanese Governments as yet available?
